title: ollama/ollama
summary: Ollama’s official CLI and server for running Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other LLMs locally with a single command.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models programmatically.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same API surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-community/llms/ollama
summary: LangChain integration that wraps Ollama models for chains, agents, and RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI (formerly Ollama-WebUI) that clones ChatGPT UX for any local Ollama model.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library providing typed builders for chat, generate, pull, and list operations.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community-maintained Ruby gem for integrating Ollama into Rails or Sinatra apps.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Enhanced interactive CLI with fuzzy-find model picker, chat history, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Proof-of-concept GitHub Copilot proxy that routes completions to a local Ollama model.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama server and WebUI on Kubernetes clusters.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official container images (cuda, rocm, cpu) with multi-arch support and docker-compose examples.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin that adds :OllamaGenerate and :OllamaChat commands using floating windows.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET 8 client with async enumerable streaming and dependency-injection friendly interfaces.

title: ollama-model-library
summary: Community-curated collection of Modelfile recipes for fine-tuned and merged LLMs.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal Retrieval-Augmented-Generation demo using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector DB.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Discord.py bot that streams Ollama replies into threads with slash-command support.

title: ollama-distroless
summary: Experimental distroless + GPU-enabled container images <150 MB for edge deployments.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to run local LLM prompts against selected notes and insert results.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Golang Slack bot using Socket-mode for real-time Ollama queries with optional approval flows.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaEmbedder nodes for pipelines.
